```{r}
              cat("Moran's I test for spatial autocorrelation:\n")
              print(moran_test)
            } else {
              cat("No spatial neighbors found - points may be too dispersed\n")
            }
          } else {
            cat("Insufficient unique locations for spatial autocorrelation test\n")
          }
        }, error = function(e3) {
          cat("Spatial autocorrelation test failed:", e3$message, "\n")
        })
      }
      
      if ("site" %in% names(pm25_ols_data)) {
        cat("\n3. Site-Level Analysis:\n")
        cat("-----------------------\n")
        
        site_summary <- pm25_ols_data %>%
          group_by(site, housing_grade_numeric) %>%
          summarise(
            mean_aqi = mean(aqi_pm25_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
            median_aqi = median(aqi_pm25_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
            n_obs = n(),
            .groups = 'drop'
          )
        
        cat("Summary by site and housing grade:\n")
        print(site_summary)
        
        if (length(unique(pm25_ols_data$housing_grade_numeric)) > 1) {
          grade_summary <- pm25_ols_data %>%
            group_by(housing_grade_numeric) %>%
            summarise(
              mean_aqi = mean(aqi_pm25_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
              median_aqi = median(aqi_pm25_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
              sd_aqi = sd(aqi_pm25_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
              n_obs = n(),
              .groups = 'drop'
            )
          
          cat("\nSummary by housing grade:\n")
          print(grade_summary)
        }
      }
      
      cat("\n4. Recommendations:\n")
      cat("-------------------\n")
      cat("• GWR analysis failed due to data structure issues\n")
      cat("• Consider data preprocessing: check for outliers, duplicate coordinates\n")
      cat("• Alternative: Use multilevel modeling or spatial lag models\n")
      cat("• The OLS results above provide a baseline global relationship\n")
    })
    
  } else {
    cat("Coordinate ranges appear invalid for Baltimore area\n")
    cat("Expected: longitude between -77.5 and -76.0, latitude between 39.0 and 40.0\n")
  }
  
} else {
  cat("Insufficient spatial data for GWR analysis\n")
  cat("Need at least", min_obs_needed, "complete observations, have:", nrow(pm25_redlining_spatial), "\n")
  
  if (nrow(pm25_redlining_spatial) > 0) {
    cat("Running simple correlation analysis instead:\n")
    cor_result <- cor.test(pm25_redlining_spatial$aqi_pm25_corrected, 
                          pm25_redlining_spatial$housing_grade_numeric, 
                          method = "spearman")
    print(cor_result)
  }
}

### 4B. REDLINING AND PM10 AQI ###
cat("\n\n4B. REDLINING AND PM10 AQI\n")
cat("============================\n\n")

# Prepare PM10 redlining data
pm10_redlining <- daily_avg %>%
  filter(!is.na(aqi_pm10_corrected)) %>%
  # Clean: Set any negative AQI values to 0 (result of corrections)
  mutate(aqi_pm10_corrected = ifelse(aqi_pm10_corrected < 0, 0, aqi_pm10_corrected))

# 4B.1. Spearman Correlation: Historic Redlining vs PM10 AQI (WITH CONTROLS)
cat("4B.1. Spearman Correlation (Partial) - Controls: Pop Density\n")
pm10_cor_data <- pm10_redlining %>% 
  filter(!is.na(housing_grade_numeric), !is.na(population_density))

if (nrow(pm10_cor_data) > 5) {
  print(pcor.test(pm10_cor_data$aqi_pm10_corrected, pm10_cor_data$housing_grade_numeric, 
                  pm10_cor_data[, c("population_density")], method = "spearman"))
}

# 4B.2. ANOVA: PM10 AQI by Historic Redlining Categories (WITH CONTROLS)
pm10_anova_results <- run_redlining_anova(pm10_redlining, "aqi_pm10_corrected")

if (!is.null(pm10_anova_results)) {
  print(pm10_anova_results$summary)
  if (pm10_anova_results$significant) {
    cat("\nSignificant differences found. Post-hoc results:\n")
    print(pm10_anova_results$letters)
  }
  
  # Visualization
  pm10_labeled_letters <- pm10_anova_results$letters %>%
    mutate(group_label = case_when(
      group == "C" ~ "C: Declining",
      group == "D" ~ "D: Hazardous",
      group == "IC" ~ "IC: Industrial",
      group == "Not Graded" ~ "Not Graded",
      TRUE ~ as.character(group)
    ))
  
  pm10_redlining_violin <- create_redlining_violin_plot(
    data_labeled = pm10_redlining,
    letters_labeled = pm10_labeled_letters,
    pollutant_label = "PM10",
    y_label = "AQI PM10 (Corrected)"
  ) +
    annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = "(c)", hjust = -0.5, vjust = 1.5, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  print(pm10_redlining_violin)
}

# 4B.3. GWR: PM10 AQI by Historic Redlining (WITH CONTROLS)
cat("\n4B.3. GWR: PM10 AQI by Historic Redlining (WITH CONTROLS)\n")
cat("===========================================================\n")

cat("Data validation and preparation:\n")

if (inherits(pm10_redlining, "data.table")) {
  pm10_redlining <- as.data.frame(pm10_redlining)
}

cat("Original PM10 data dimensions:", dim(pm10_redlining), "\n")
cat("Data quality check:\n")
cat("  - Total rows:", nrow(pm10_redlining), "\n")
cat("  - Missing longitude:", sum(is.na(pm10_redlining$longitude)), "\n")
cat("  - Missing latitude:", sum(is.na(pm10_redlining$latitude)), "\n")
cat("  - Missing aqi_pm10_corrected:", sum(is.na(pm10_redlining$aqi_pm10_corrected)), "\n")
cat("  - Missing housing_grade_numeric:", sum(is.na(pm10_redlining$housing_grade_numeric)), "\n")

pm10_redlining_spatial <- pm10_redlining %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(
    longitude = as.numeric(longitude),
    latitude = as.numeric(latitude),
    aqi_pm10_corrected = as.numeric(aqi_pm10_corrected),
    housing_grade_numeric = as.numeric(housing_grade_numeric)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(longitude), !is.na(latitude),
    !is.na(aqi_pm10_corrected), !is.na(housing_grade_numeric),
    is.finite(longitude), is.finite(latitude),
    is.finite(aqi_pm10_corrected), is.finite(housing_grade_numeric),
    longitude >= -77.5, longitude <= -76.0,
    latitude >= 39.0, latitude <= 40.0,
    aqi_pm10_corrected >= 0, aqi_pm10_corrected <= 500
  ) %>%
  group_by(site, longitude, latitude) %>%
  summarise(
    aqi_pm10_corrected = mean(aqi_pm10_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
    housing_grade_numeric = mean(housing_grade_numeric, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

cat("After filtering - dimensions:", dim(pm10_redlining_spatial), "\n")

min_obs_needed <- 30

if (nrow(pm10_redlining_spatial) >= min_obs_needed) {
  
  coord_summary <- pm10_redlining_spatial %>%
    summarise(
      lon_min = min(longitude), lon_max = max(longitude),
      lat_min = min(latitude), lat_max = max(latitude),
      lon_range = max(longitude) - min(longitude),
      lat_range = max(latitude) - min(latitude)
    )
  
  cat("Coordinate ranges:\n")
  print(coord_summary)
  
  if (coord_summary$lon_min > -77.5 && coord_summary$lon_max < -76.0 &&
      coord_summary$lat_min > 39.0 && coord_summary$lat_max < 40.0) {
    
    tryCatch({
      temp_df <- as.data.frame(pm10_redlining_spatial)
      
      cat("Pre-spatial conversion check:\n")
      cat("  - Rows:", nrow(temp_df), "\n")
      cat("  - Unique coordinates:", nrow(unique(temp_df[, c("longitude", "latitude")])), "\n")
      
      coordinates(temp_df) <- ~longitude + latitude
      proj4string(temp_df) <- CRS("+proj=longlat +datum=WGS84")
      
      pm10_redlining_spatial <- temp_df
      
      cat("Spatial data frame created successfully\n")
      cat("Number of spatial points:", nrow(pm10_redlining_spatial), "\n")
      
      bbox_result <- bbox(pm10_redlining_spatial)
      cat("Bounding box:\n")
      print(bbox_result)
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("Error creating spatial data frame:", e$message, "\n")
      stop("Cannot proceed with GWR - spatial data frame creation failed")
    })
    
    tryCatch({
      cat("Attempting bandwidth selection...\n")
      
      bw_pm10_redlining <- NULL
      
      approaches_to_try <- list(
        list(approach = "CV", kernel = "gaussian", adaptive = TRUE),
        list(approach = "AIC", kernel = "gaussian", adaptive = TRUE),
        list(approach = "CV", kernel = "bisquare", adaptive = TRUE),
        list(approach = "AIC", kernel = "bisquare", adaptive = TRUE),
        list(approach = "AIC", kernel = "gaussian", adaptive = FALSE)
      )
      
      for (i in seq_along(approaches_to_try)) {
        approach_params <- approaches_to_try[[i]]
        cat("Trying approach", i, ":", approach_params$approach, "with", approach_params$kernel, "kernel\n")
        
        bw_result <- tryCatch({
          do.call(bw.gwr, c(
            list(formula = aqi_pm10_corrected ~ housing_grade_numeric,
                 data = pm10_redlining_spatial,
                 longlat = TRUE),
            approach_params
          ))
        }, error = function(e) {
          cat("  Failed:", e$message, "\n")
          NULL
        })
        
        if (!is.null(bw_result) && is.finite(bw_result) && bw_result > 0) {
          bw_pm10_redlining <- bw_result
          cat("  Success! Bandwidth:", bw_pm10_redlining, "\n")
          break
        }
      }
      
      n_points <- nrow(pm10_redlining_spatial)
      if (is.null(bw_pm10_redlining) || !is.finite(bw_pm10_redlining)) {
        bw_pm10_redlining <- max(30, round(0.3 * n_points))
        cat("Using default bandwidth:", bw_pm10_redlining, "\n")
      }
      
      if (bw_pm10_redlining < 10) {
        bw_pm10_redlining <- 10
        cat("Adjusted bandwidth to minimum value:", bw_pm10_redlining, "\n")
      } else if (bw_pm10_redlining > 0.8 * n_points) {
        bw_pm10_redlining <- round(0.8 * n_points)
        cat("Adjusted bandwidth to maximum value:", bw_pm10_redlining, "\n")
      }
      
      cat("Running GWR with bandwidth:", bw_pm10_redlining, "\n")
      
      gwr_pm10_redlining <- gwr.basic(
        aqi_pm10_corrected ~ housing_grade_numeric, 
        data = pm10_redlining_spatial,
        bw = bw_pm10_redlining,
        kernel = "gaussian",
        adaptive = TRUE,
        longlat = TRUE,
        F1 = TRUE,
        F2 = TRUE,
        F3 = TRUE
      )
      
      cat("GWR Results Summary:\n")
      cat("Bandwidth (adaptive):", bw_pm10_redlining, "\n")
      cat("Global R-squared:", round(gwr_pm10_redlining$GW.diagnostic$gwR2, 4), "\n")
      
      if (!is.null(gwr_pm10_redlining$SDF) && 
          !is.null(gwr_pm10_redlining$SDF$Local_R2)) {
        
        local_r2_range <- range(gwr_pm10_redlining$SDF$Local_R2, na.rm = TRUE)
        cat("Local R-squared range:", round(local_r2_range[1], 4), "to", round(local_r2_range[2], 4), "\n")
        
        gwr_pm10_coefs <- data.frame(
          site = pm10_redlining_spatial$site,
          longitude = coordinates(pm10_redlining_spatial)[,1],
          latitude = coordinates(pm10_redlining_spatial)[,2],
          redlining_coef = gwr_pm10_redlining$SDF$housing_grade_numeric,
          local_r2 = gwr_pm10_redlining$SDF$Local_R2
        )
        
        gwr_pm10_coefs <- gwr_pm10_coefs %>%
          filter(!is.na(redlining_coef), !is.na(local_r2))
        
        if (nrow(gwr_pm10_coefs) > 0) {
          cat("Historic redlining coefficient summary:\n")
          print(summary(gwr_pm10_coefs$redlining_coef))
          
          cat("Local R-squared summary:\n")
          print(summary(gwr_pm10_coefs$local_r2))
          
          positive_coefs <- sum(gwr_pm10_coefs$redlining_coef > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
          negative_coefs <- sum(gwr_pm10_coefs$redlining_coef < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
          
          cat("Coefficient interpretation:\n")
          cat("  - Locations with positive coefficients (worse redlining → higher PM10 AQI):", positive_coefs, "\n")
          cat("  - Locations with negative coefficients (worse redlining → lower PM10 AQI):", negative_coefs, "\n")
          
        } else {
          cat("No valid coefficients extracted from GWR results\n")
        }
        
      } else {
        cat("GWR completed but results structure is invalid\n")
      }
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("GWR failed for PM10-redlining analysis:", e$message, "\n")
      
      cat("\n" , paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
      cat("FALLBACK ANALYSIS: Alternative Spatial Methods\n")
      cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
      
      pm10_ols_data <- tryCatch({
        as.data.frame(pm10_redlining_spatial)
      }, error = function(e2) {
        pm10_redlining_spatial
      })
      
      cat("\n1. Global OLS Regression:\n")
      cat("-------------------------\n")
      pm10_ols_model <- lm(aqi_pm10_corrected ~ housing_grade_numeric, data = pm10_ols_data)
      print(summary(pm10_ols_model))
      
      if ("longitude" %in% names(pm10_ols_data) && "latitude" %in% names(pm10_ols_data)) {
        cat("\n2. Spatial Autocorrelation Test:\n")
        cat("--------------------------------\n")
        
        tryCatch({
          library(spdep)
          coords <- pm10_ols_data[, c("longitude", "latitude")]
          coords_unique <- unique(coords)
          
          if (nrow(coords_unique) > 3) {
            nb <- dnearneigh(as.matrix(coords_unique), 0, 0.1)
            
            if (any(card(nb) > 0)) {
              lw <- nb2listw(nb, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)
              moran_test <- moran.test(residuals(pm10_ols_model), lw, zero.policy = TRUE)
              cat("Moran's I test for spatial autocorrelation:\n")
              print(moran_test)
            } else {
              cat("No spatial neighbors found - points may be too dispersed\n")
            }
          } else {
            cat("Insufficient unique locations for spatial autocorrelation test\n")
          }
        }, error = function(e3) {
          cat("Spatial autocorrelation test failed:", e3$message, "\n")
        })
      }
      
      if ("site" %in% names(pm10_ols_data)) {
        cat("\n3. Site-Level Analysis:\n")
        cat("-----------------------\n")
        
        site_summary <- pm10_ols_data %>%
          group_by(site, housing_grade_numeric) %>%
          summarise(
            mean_aqi = mean(aqi_pm10_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
            median_aqi = median(aqi_pm10_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
            n_obs = n(),
            .groups = 'drop'
          )
        
        cat("Summary by site and housing grade:\n")
        print(site_summary)
        
        if (length(unique(pm10_ols_data$housing_grade_numeric)) > 1) {
          grade_summary <- pm10_ols_data %>%
            group_by(housing_grade_numeric) %>%
            summarise(
              mean_aqi = mean(aqi_pm10_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
              median_aqi = median(aqi_pm10_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
              sd_aqi = sd(aqi_pm10_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
              n_obs = n(),
              .groups = 'drop'
            )
          
          cat("\nSummary by housing grade:\n")
          print(grade_summary)
        }
      }
      
      cat("\n4. Recommendations:\n")
      cat("-------------------\n")
      cat("• GWR analysis failed due to data structure issues\n")
      cat("• Consider data preprocessing: check for outliers, duplicate coordinates\n")
      cat("• Alternative: Use multilevel modeling or spatial lag models\n")
      cat("• The OLS results above provide a baseline global relationship\n")
    })
    
  } else {
    cat("Coordinate ranges appear invalid for Baltimore area\n")
  }
}

### 4C. REDLINING AND OZONE AQI ###
cat("\n\n4C. REDLINING AND OZONE AQI\n")
cat("=============================\n\n")

# Prepare Ozone redlining data
ozone_redlining <- daily_avg %>%
  filter(!is.na(aqi_ozone_corrected)) %>%
  # Clean: Set any negative AQI values to 0 (result of corrections)
  mutate(aqi_ozone_corrected = ifelse(aqi_ozone_corrected < 0, 0, aqi_ozone_corrected))

# 4C.1. Spearman Correlation: Historic Redlining vs Ozone AQI (WITH CONTROLS)
cat("4C.1. Spearman Correlation (Partial) - Controls: Pop Density\n")
ozone_cor_data <- ozone_redlining %>% 
  filter(!is.na(housing_grade_numeric), !is.na(population_density))

if (nrow(ozone_cor_data) > 5) {
  print(pcor.test(ozone_cor_data$aqi_ozone_corrected, ozone_cor_data$housing_grade_numeric, 
                  ozone_cor_data[, c("population_density")], method = "spearman"))
}

# 4C.2. ANOVA: Ozone AQI by Historic Redlining Categories (WITH CONTROLS)
ozone_anova_results <- run_redlining_anova(ozone_redlining, "aqi_ozone_corrected")

if (!is.null(ozone_anova_results)) {
  print(ozone_anova_results$summary)
  if (ozone_anova_results$significant) {
    cat("\nSignificant differences found. Post-hoc results:\n")
    print(ozone_anova_results$letters)
  }
  
  # Visualization
  ozone_labeled_letters <- ozone_anova_results$letters %>%
    mutate(group_label = case_when(
      group == "C" ~ "C: Declining",
      group == "D" ~ "D: Hazardous",
      group == "IC" ~ "IC: Industrial",
      group == "Not Graded" ~ "Not Graded",
      TRUE ~ as.character(group)
    ))
  
  ozone_redlining_violin <- create_redlining_violin_plot(
    data_labeled = ozone_redlining,
    letters_labeled = ozone_labeled_letters,
    pollutant_label = "Ozone",
    y_label = "AQI Ozone (Corrected)"
  ) +
    annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = "(d)", hjust = -0.5, vjust = 1.5, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  print(ozone_redlining_violin)
}

# 4C.3. GWR: Ozone AQI by Historic Redlining (WITH CONTROLS)
cat("\n4C.3. GWR: Ozone AQI by Historic Redlining (WITH CONTROLS)\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

cat("Data validation and preparation:\n")

if (inherits(ozone_redlining, "data.table")) {
  ozone_redlining <- as.data.frame(ozone_redlining)
}

cat("Original Ozone data dimensions:", dim(ozone_redlining), "\n")
cat("Data quality check:\n")
cat("  - Total rows:", nrow(ozone_redlining), "\n")
cat("  - Missing longitude:", sum(is.na(ozone_redlining$longitude)), "\n")
cat("  - Missing latitude:", sum(is.na(ozone_redlining$latitude)), "\n")
cat("  - Missing aqi_ozone_corrected:", sum(is.na(ozone_redlining$aqi_ozone_corrected)), "\n")
cat("  - Missing housing_grade_numeric:", sum(is.na(ozone_redlining$housing_grade_numeric)), "\n")

ozone_redlining_spatial <- ozone_redlining %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(
    longitude = as.numeric(longitude),
    latitude = as.numeric(latitude),
    aqi_ozone_corrected = as.numeric(aqi_ozone_corrected),
    housing_grade_numeric = as.numeric(housing_grade_numeric)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(longitude), !is.na(latitude),
    !is.na(aqi_ozone_corrected), !is.na(housing_grade_numeric),
    is.finite(longitude), is.finite(latitude),
    is.finite(aqi_ozone_corrected), is.finite(housing_grade_numeric),
    longitude >= -77.5, longitude <= -76.0,
    latitude >= 39.0, latitude <= 40.0,
    aqi_ozone_corrected >= 0, aqi_ozone_corrected <= 500
  ) %>%
  group_by(site, longitude, latitude) %>%
  summarise(
    aqi_ozone_corrected = mean(aqi_ozone_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
    housing_grade_numeric = mean(housing_grade_numeric, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

cat("After filtering - dimensions:", dim(ozone_redlining_spatial), "\n")

min_obs_needed <- 30

if (nrow(ozone_redlining_spatial) >= min_obs_needed) {
  
  coord_summary <- ozone_redlining_spatial %>%
    summarise(
      lon_min = min(longitude), lon_max = max(longitude),
      lat_min = min(latitude), lat_max = max(latitude),
      lon_range = max(longitude) - min(longitude),
      lat_range = max(latitude) - min(latitude)
    )
  
  cat("Coordinate ranges:\n")
  print(coord_summary)
  
  if (coord_summary$lon_min > -77.5 && coord_summary$lon_max < -76.0 &&
      coord_summary$lat_min > 39.0 && coord_summary$lat_max < 40.0) {
    
    tryCatch({
      temp_df <- as.data.frame(ozone_redlining_spatial)
      
      cat("Pre-spatial conversion check:\n")
      cat("  - Rows:", nrow(temp_df), "\n")
      cat("  - Unique coordinates:", nrow(unique(temp_df[, c("longitude", "latitude")])), "\n")
      
      coordinates(temp_df) <- ~longitude + latitude
      proj4string(temp_df) <- CRS("+proj=longlat +datum=WGS84")
      
      ozone_redlining_spatial <- temp_df
      
      cat("Spatial data frame created successfully\n")
      cat("Number of spatial points:", nrow(ozone_redlining_spatial), "\n")
      
      bbox_result <- bbox(ozone_redlining_spatial)
      cat("Bounding box:\n")
      print(bbox_result)
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("Error creating spatial data frame:", e$message, "\n")
      stop("Cannot proceed with GWR - spatial data frame creation failed")
    })
    
    tryCatch({
      cat("Attempting bandwidth selection...\n")
      
      bw_ozone_redlining <- NULL
      
      approaches_to_try <- list(
        list(approach = "CV", kernel = "gaussian", adaptive = TRUE),
        list(approach = "AIC", kernel = "gaussian", adaptive = TRUE),
        list(approach = "CV", kernel = "bisquare", adaptive = TRUE),
        list(approach = "AIC", kernel = "bisquare", adaptive = TRUE),
        list(approach = "AIC", kernel = "gaussian", adaptive = FALSE)
      )
      
      for (i in seq_along(approaches_to_try)) {
        approach_params <- approaches_to_try[[i]]
        cat("Trying approach", i, ":", approach_params$approach, "with", approach_params$kernel, "kernel\n")
        
        bw_result <- tryCatch({
          do.call(bw.gwr, c(
            list(formula = aqi_ozone_corrected ~ housing_grade_numeric,
                 data = ozone_redlining_spatial,
                 longlat = TRUE),
            approach_params
          ))
        }, error = function(e) {
          cat("  Failed:", e$message, "\n")
          NULL
        })
        
        if (!is.null(bw_result) && is.finite(bw_result) && bw_result > 0) {
          bw_ozone_redlining <- bw_result
          cat("  Success! Bandwidth:", bw_ozone_redlining, "\n")
          break
        }
      }
      
      n_points <- nrow(ozone_redlining_spatial)
      if (is.null(bw_ozone_redlining) || !is.finite(bw_ozone_redlining)) {
        bw_ozone_redlining <- max(30, round(0.3 * n_points))
        cat("Using default bandwidth:", bw_ozone_redlining, "\n")
      }
      
      if (bw_ozone_redlining < 10) {
        bw_ozone_redlining <- 10
        cat("Adjusted bandwidth to minimum value:", bw_ozone_redlining, "\n")
      } else if (bw_ozone_redlining > 0.8 * n_points) {
        bw_ozone_redlining <- round(0.8 * n_points)
        cat("Adjusted bandwidth to maximum value:", bw_ozone_redlining, "\n")
      }
      
      cat("Running GWR with bandwidth:", bw_ozone_redlining, "\n")
      
      gwr_ozone_redlining <- gwr.basic(
        aqi_ozone_corrected ~ housing_grade_numeric, 
        data = ozone_redlining_spatial,
        bw = bw_ozone_redlining,
        kernel = "gaussian",
        adaptive = TRUE,
        longlat = TRUE,
        F1 = TRUE,
        F2 = TRUE,
        F3 = TRUE
      )
      
      cat("GWR Results Summary:\n")
      cat("Bandwidth (adaptive):", bw_ozone_redlining, "\n")
      cat("Global R-squared:", round(gwr_ozone_redlining$GW.diagnostic$gwR2, 4), "\n")
      
      if (!is.null(gwr_ozone_redlining$SDF) && 
          !is.null(gwr_ozone_redlining$SDF$Local_R2)) {
        
        local_r2_range <- range(gwr_ozone_redlining$SDF$Local_R2, na.rm = TRUE)
        cat("Local R-squared range:", round(local_r2_range[1], 4), "to", round(local_r2_range[2], 4), "\n")
        
        gwr_ozone_coefs <- data.frame(
          site = ozone_redlining_spatial$site,
          longitude = coordinates(ozone_redlining_spatial)[,1],
          latitude = coordinates(ozone_redlining_spatial)[,2],
          redlining_coef = gwr_ozone_redlining$SDF$housing_grade_numeric,
          local_r2 = gwr_ozone_redlining$SDF$Local_R2
        )
        
        gwr_ozone_coefs <- gwr_ozone_coefs %>%
          filter(!is.na(redlining_coef), !is.na(local_r2))
        
        if (nrow(gwr_ozone_coefs) > 0) {
          cat("Historic redlining coefficient summary:\n")
          print(summary(gwr_ozone_coefs$redlining_coef))
          
          cat("Local R-squared summary:\n")
          print(summary(gwr_ozone_coefs$local_r2))
          
          positive_coefs <- sum(gwr_ozone_coefs$redlining_coef > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
          negative_coefs <- sum(gwr_ozone_coefs$redlining_coef < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
          
          cat("Coefficient interpretation:\n")
          cat("  - Locations with positive coefficients (worse redlining → higher Ozone AQI):", positive_coefs, "\n")
          cat("  - Locations with negative coefficients (worse redlining → lower Ozone AQI):", negative_coefs, "\n")
          
        } else {
          cat("No valid coefficients extracted from GWR results\n")
        }
        
      } else {
        cat("GWR completed but results structure is invalid\n")
      }
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("GWR failed for Ozone-redlining analysis:", e$message, "\n")
      
      cat("\n" , paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
      cat("FALLBACK ANALYSIS: Alternative Spatial Methods\n")
      cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
      
      ozone_ols_data <- tryCatch({
        as.data.frame(ozone_redlining_spatial)
      }, error = function(e2) {
        ozone_redlining_spatial
      })
      
      cat("\n1. Global OLS Regression:\n")
      cat("-------------------------\n")
      ozone_ols_model <- lm(aqi_ozone_corrected ~ housing_grade_numeric, data = ozone_ols_data)
      print(summary(ozone_ols_model))
      
      if ("longitude" %in% names(ozone_ols_data) && "latitude" %in% names(ozone_ols_data)) {
        cat("\n2. Spatial Autocorrelation Test:\n")
        cat("--------------------------------\n")
        
        tryCatch({
          library(spdep)
          coords <- ozone_ols_data[, c("longitude", "latitude")]
          coords_unique <- unique(coords)
          
          if (nrow(coords_unique) > 3) {
            nb <- dnearneigh(as.matrix(coords_unique), 0, 0.1)
            
            if (any(card(nb) > 0)) {
              lw <- nb2listw(nb, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)
              moran_test <- moran.test(residuals(ozone_ols_model), lw, zero.policy = TRUE)
              cat("Moran's I test for spatial autocorrelation:\n")
              print(moran_test)
            } else {
              cat("No spatial neighbors found - points may be too dispersed\n")
            }
          } else {
            cat("Insufficient unique locations for spatial autocorrelation test\n")
          }
        }, error = function(e3) {
          cat("Spatial autocorrelation test failed:", e3$message, "\n")
        })
      }
      
      if ("site" %in% names(ozone_ols_data)) {
        cat("\n3. Site-Level Analysis:\n")
        cat("-----------------------\n")
        
        site_summary <- ozone_ols_data %>%
          group_by(site, housing_grade_numeric) %>%
          summarise(
            mean_aqi = mean(aqi_ozone_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
            median_aqi = median(aqi_ozone_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
            n_obs = n(),
            .groups = 'drop'
          )
        
        cat("Summary by site and housing grade:\n")
        print(site_summary)
        
        if (length(unique(ozone_ols_data$housing_grade_numeric)) > 1) {
          grade_summary <- ozone_ols_data %>%
            group_by(housing_grade_numeric) %>%
            summarise(
              mean_aqi = mean(aqi_ozone_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
              median_aqi = median(aqi_ozone_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
              sd_aqi = sd(aqi_ozone_corrected, na.rm = TRUE),
              n_obs = n(),
              .groups = 'drop'
            )
          
          cat("\nSummary by housing grade:\n")
          print(grade_summary)
        }
      }
      
      cat("\n4. Recommendations:\n")
      cat("-------------------\n")
      cat("• GWR analysis failed due to data structure issues\n")
      cat("• Consider data preprocessing: check for outliers, duplicate coordinates\n")
      cat("• Alternative: Use multilevel modeling or spatial lag models\n")
      cat("• The OLS results above provide a baseline global relationship\n")
    })
    
  } else {
    cat("Coordinate ranges appear invalid for Baltimore area\n")
    cat("Expected: longitude between -77.5 and -76.0, latitude between 39.0 and 40.0\n")
  }
  
} else {
  cat("Insufficient spatial data for GWR analysis\n")
  cat("Need at least", min_obs_needed, "complete observations, have:", nrow(ozone_redlining_spatial), "\n")
  
  if (nrow(ozone_redlining_spatial) > 0) {
    cat("Running simple correlation analysis instead:\n")
    cor_result <- cor.test(ozone_redlining_spatial$aqi_ozone_corrected, 
                          ozone_redlining_spatial$housing_grade_numeric, 
                          method = "spearman")
    print(cor_result)
  }
}

### 4D. COMPREHENSIVE COMPARISON: ALL POLLUTANTS ACROSS REDLINING GRADES ###
cat("\n\n4D. COMPREHENSIVE COMPARISON: ALL POLLUTANTS VS REDLINING\n")
cat("===========================================================\n\n")

# Combine all three pollutant datasets
combined_pollutants <- bind_rows(
  pm25_redlining %>%
    dplyr::select(site, timestamp_day, housing_grade, aqi_pm25_corrected, land_use_type, population_density) %>%
    dplyr::rename(aqi_value = aqi_pm25_corrected) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(pollutant = "PM2.5"),
  
  pm10_redlining %>%
    dplyr::select(site, timestamp_day, housing_grade, aqi_pm10_corrected, land_use_type, population_density) %>%
    dplyr::rename(aqi_value = aqi_pm10_corrected) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(pollutant = "PM10"),
  
  ozone_redlining %>%
    dplyr::select(site, timestamp_day, housing_grade, aqi_ozone_corrected, land_use_type, population_density) %>%
    dplyr::rename(aqi_value = aqi_ozone_corrected) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(pollutant = "Ozone")
)

# Clean data: Set any negative AQI values to 0 (result of corrections)
cat("Checking for negative AQI values from corrections...\n")
negative_count <- sum(combined_pollutants$aqi_value < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
cat("  Found", negative_count, "negative AQI values\n")

if (negative_count > 0) {
  cat("  Setting negative values to 0 (standard practice)\n")
  combined_pollutants <- combined_pollutants %>%
    dplyr::mutate(aqi_value = ifelse(aqi_value < 0, 0, aqi_value))
}

# Summary statistics by pollutant and redlining grade
cat("\nSummary statistics by pollutant and redlining grade:\n")
summary_stats <- combined_pollutants %>%
  group_by(pollutant, housing_grade) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_aqi = round(mean(aqi_value, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    median_aqi = round(median(aqi_value, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    sd_aqi = round(sd(aqi_value, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    min_aqi = round(min(aqi_value, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    max_aqi = round(max(aqi_value, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )
print(summary_stats)

# 4D.1. Generate significance letters for each pollutant
cat("\n4D.1. Generating significance letters for each pollutant...\n")

# Run ANOVA and Tukey HSD for each pollutant
all_letters <- list()

for (poll in c("PM2.5", "PM10", "Ozone")) {
  cat("  Processing", poll, "...\n")
  
  # Filter data for this pollutant and remove NAs in model variables
  pollutant_data <- combined_pollutants %>% 
    filter(pollutant == poll) %>%
    filter(!is.na(aqi_value), !is.na(housing_grade), !is.na(population_density))
  
  if (nrow(pollutant_data) < 5) {
    cat("    Insufficient data for", poll, " (n < 5). Skipping analysis.\n")
    next
  }

  # Ensure factors have proper levels
  pollutant_data$housing_grade <- factor(pollutant_data$housing_grade, 
                                         levels = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "IC", "Not Graded"))
  
  # Count distinct levels to avoid the "contrasts" error
  h_levels <- n_distinct(pollutant_data$housing_grade)
  
  if (h_levels >= 2) {
    # Run ANOVA
    poll_anova <- aov(aqi_value ~ housing_grade + population_density, 
                      data = pollutant_data)
    poll_anova_summary <- summary(poll_anova)
    
    # Check if significant
    p_val <- poll_anova_summary[[1]][["Pr(>F)"]][1]
    if (!is.null(p_val) && !is.na(p_val) && p_val < 0.05) {
      # Run Tukey HSD
      tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(poll_anova, "housing_grade")
      
      cat("    Tukey HSD p-values for", poll, ":\n")
      print(tukey_result$housing_grade[, "p adj"])
      
      # Generate letters using multcompView
      tukey_p_values <- tukey_result$housing_grade[, "p adj"]
      
      # Extract group names from row names of Tukey results
      comparison_names <- rownames(tukey_result$housing_grade)
      names(tukey_p_values) <- comparison_names
      
      letters_result <- multcompLetters(tukey_p_values)
      
      # Create dataframe with letters
      letters_df <- data.frame(
        housing_grade = names(letters_result$Letters),
        letters = as.character(letters_result$Letters),
        pollutant = poll,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      
      cat("    Significance letters for", poll, ":\n")
      print(letters_df)
      
      all_letters[[poll]] <- letters_df
    } else {
      # No significant differences
      cat("    No significant differences for", poll, "\n")
      unique_grades <- levels(pollutant_data$housing_grade)
      unique_grades <- unique_grades[unique_grades %in% unique(pollutant_data$housing_grade)]
      
      letters_df <- data.frame(
        housing_grade = unique_grades,
        letters = "a",
        pollutant = poll,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      all_letters[[poll]] <- letters_df
    }
  } else {
    cat("    Insufficient distinct levels for ANOVA for", poll, ".\n")
    unique_grades <- levels(pollutant_data$housing_grade)
    unique_grades <- unique_grades[unique_grades %in% unique(pollutant_data$housing_grade)]
    
    letters_df <- data.frame(
      housing_grade = unique_grades,
      letters = "a",
      pollutant = poll,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    all_letters[[poll]] <- letters_df
  }
}

# Combine all letters
combined_letters <- bind_rows(all_letters)

# Ensure columns exist if empty
if (nrow(combined_letters) == 0) {
  combined_letters <- data.frame(housing_grade = factor(), letters = character(), pollutant = character(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

if (nrow(combined_letters) > 0) {
  # Calculate y-positions for letters (dynamically above the data)
  y_positions <- combined_pollutants %>%
    group_by(pollutant, housing_grade) %>%
    summarise(
      max_aqi = max(aqi_value, na.rm = TRUE),
      q75 = quantile(aqi_value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      iqr = IQR(aqi_value, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      # Position above upper whisker or max value
      whisker_top = q75 + 1.8 * iqr,
      y_pos = pmax(whisker_top, max_aqi) * 1.05 + 2
    )

  # Merge letters with y-positions
  combined_letters <- combined_letters %>%
    left_join(y_positions, by = c("pollutant", "housing_grade"))
} else {
  combined_letters$y_pos <- numeric()
}

cat("Significance letters generated.\n")
print(combined_letters)

# 4D.2. Faceted violin plot comparison with significance letters
cat("\n4D.2. Creating faceted violin plot comparison with significance letters...\n")

# Define HOLC redlining map colors
holc_colors <- c(
  "A" = "#4CAF50",           # Green (Best)
  "B" = "#2196F3",           # Blue (Still Desirable)
  "C" = "#FFC107",           # Yellow/Amber (Declining)
  "D" = "#F44336",           # Red (Hazardous)
  "IC" = "#89C4E1",          # Light Blue (Industrial/Commercial)
  "Not Graded" = "#757575",  # Dark Gray (Not Graded)
  "C: Declining" = "#FFC107",
  "D: Hazardous" = "#F44336",
  "IC: Industrial" = "#89C4E1",
  "Not Graded" = "#757575"
)

# Add descriptive labels to combined data
combined_pollutants_labeled <- combined_pollutants %>%
  mutate(housing_grade_label = case_when(
    housing_grade == "C" ~ "C: Declining",
    housing_grade == "D" ~ "D: Hazardous",
    housing_grade == "IC" ~ "IC: Industrial",
    housing_grade == "Not Graded" ~ "Not Graded",
    TRUE ~ as.character(housing_grade)
  )) %>%
  mutate(housing_grade_label = factor(housing_grade_label, 
                                      levels = c("C: Declining", "D: Hazardous", "IC: Industrial", "Not Graded")))

# Update combined letters to use labeled grades
combined_letters_labeled <- combined_letters %>%
  mutate(housing_grade_label = case_when(
    housing_grade == "C" ~ "C: Declining",
    housing_grade == "D" ~ "D: Hazardous",
    housing_grade == "IC" ~ "IC: Industrial",
    housing_grade == "Not Graded" ~ "Not Graded",
    TRUE ~ as.character(housing_grade)
  ))

pollutant_comparison_violin <- ggplot(combined_pollutants_labeled, 
                                       aes(x = housing_grade_label, y = aqi_value, fill = housing_grade_label)) +
  geom_violin(color = "white", lwd = 0.8, alpha = 0.8, trim = FALSE) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", shape = 21, size = 2.5, 
               fill = "white", color = "black", stroke = 1) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.05, size = 0.3, color = "black") +
  
  # Add significance letters - larger and more prominent
  geom_text(data = combined_letters_labeled, 
            aes(x = housing_grade_label, y = y_pos, label = letters),
            size = 7, fontface = "bold", color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  facet_wrap(~pollutant, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "Historic housing grade",
    y = "Air Quality Index (AQI)",
    fill = "Redlining Grade"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.margin = margin(15, 15, 15, 15),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = holc_colors) 

print(pollutant_comparison_violin)

cat("\n=============================================================================\n")
cat("COMPREHENSIVE COMPARISON COMPLETE\n")
cat("=============================================================================\n\n")

```
##4. SVI + AQI
#####4a. PM2.5 Spatial Lag + PM10 Spatial Lag
```{r}
cat("\n=============================================================================\n")
cat("4. SOCIAL VULNERABILITY INDEX AND AQI (PM2.5 and PM10)\n")
cat("=============================================================================\n\n")

# ============================================================================
# PM2.5 ANALYSIS
# ============================================================================
cat("\n--- PM2.5 AQI Analysis ---\n\n")

# For each day, fit a spatial lag model to understand social vulnerability effects on PM2.5
cat("Fitting spatial lag models for PM2.5 (parallel processing enabled)...\n")
results_by_day_pm25 <- run_daily_spatial_regression(daily_avg, "aqi_pm25_corrected")

# Effect of social vulnerability on PM2.5 AQI over time (controlling for population density and land use)
results_by_day_pm25 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = coef_social_vuln)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, size = coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "red"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Social Vulnerability Coefficient",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31"))) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 1))  # Adjust limits as needed

# 2. Plot spatial autocorrelation (rho) over time for PM2.5
results_by_day_pm25 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = rho)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = rho_p < 0.05, size = rho_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "blue"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Spatial Lag Parameter (rho)",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31")))

# 3. Summary of significant social vulnerability effects for PM2.5
cat("Summary of Social Vulnerability Effects on PM2.5 AQI:\n")
cat("=====================================================\n")

significant_days_pm25 <- results_by_day_pm25 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success", coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05)

  cat("Days with significant social vulnerability effect:", nrow(significant_days_pm25), "out of", 
      nrow(results_by_day_pm25 %>% filter(model_fit == "Success")), "\n")
  
  success_count_pm25 <- nrow(results_by_day_pm25 %>% filter(model_fit == "Success"))
  cat("Percentage of days with significant effect:", 
      ifelse(success_count_pm25 > 0, round(nrow(significant_days_pm25) / success_count_pm25 * 100, 1), 0), "%\n\n")

if (nrow(significant_days_pm25) > 0) {
  cat("Summary of significant effects:\n")
  print(summary(significant_days_pm25$coef_social_vuln))
  
  cat("\nDirection of effects:\n")
  cat("Positive effects (worse air quality in vulnerable areas):", 
      sum(significant_days_pm25$coef_social_vuln > 0), "days\n")
  cat("Negative effects (better air quality in vulnerable areas):", 
      sum(significant_days_pm25$coef_social_vuln < 0), "days\n")
}

# 4. Monthly averages to identify seasonal patterns for PM2.5
monthly_effects_pm25 <- results_by_day_pm25 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(month = month(date), year = year(date)) %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_coef = mean(coef_social_vuln, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_coef_sig = mean(coef_social_vuln[coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE),
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_days = sum(coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(month_year = paste(year, month, sep = "-"))

ggplot(monthly_effects_pm25, aes(x = month_year, y = mean_coef)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = n_sig_days > 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "red")) +
  labs(
    x = "Month-Year",
    y = "Average Social Vulnerability Coefficient",
    fill = "Has Significant Days"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# 5. Model diagnostics for PM2.5
cat("\nPM2.5 Model Diagnostics:\n")
cat("==================\n")
model_summary_pm25 <- results_by_day_pm25 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  summarise(
    total_days = n(),
    successful_models = sum(model_fit == "Success"),
    avg_sites_per_model = mean(n_sites, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_sites = min(n_sites, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sites = max(n_sites, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print(model_summary_pm25)

# 6. Identify specific time periods with strongest social vulnerability effects for PM2.5
cat("\nTime Periods with Strongest Social Vulnerability Effects (PM2.5):\n")
cat("========================================================\n")

# Top 10 days with strongest positive effects (worse air quality in vulnerable areas)
top_positive_effects_pm25 <- results_by_day_pm25 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success", coef_social_vuln > 0, coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(desc(coef_social_vuln)) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  dplyr::select(date, coef_social_vuln, coef_social_vuln_p, rho, rho_p, n_sites)

cat("Top 10 days with strongest positive effects (worse air quality in vulnerable areas):\n")
print(top_positive_effects_pm25)

# Top 10 days with strongest negative effects (better air quality in vulnerable areas)
top_negative_effects_pm25 <- results_by_day_pm25 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success", coef_social_vuln < 0, coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(coef_social_vuln) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  dplyr::select(date, coef_social_vuln, coef_social_vuln_p, rho, rho_p, n_sites)

cat("\nTop 10 days with strongest negative effects (better air quality in vulnerable areas):\n")
print(top_negative_effects_pm25)

# 7. Seasonal analysis for PM2.5
seasonal_effects_pm25 <- results_by_day_pm25 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(
    season = get_season_year(date)
  ) %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  summarise(
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_days = sum(coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_coef = mean(coef_social_vuln, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_coef_sig = mean(coef_social_vuln[coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rho = mean(rho, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("\nSeasonal Analysis of Social Vulnerability Effects (PM2.5):\n")
print(seasonal_effects_pm25)

# 8. Analysis of control variables for PM2.5
cat("\nAnalysis of Control Variables (PM2.5):\n")
cat("==============================\n")

# Population density effects
pop_density_summary_pm25 <- results_by_day_pm25 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  summarise(
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_pop_density = sum(coef_pop_density_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_pop_density_coef = mean(coef_pop_density, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_pop_density_coef_sig = mean(coef_pop_density[coef_pop_density_p < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Population Density Effects:\n")
cat("Days with significant population density effect:", pop_density_summary_pm25$n_sig_pop_density, 
    "out of", pop_density_summary_pm25$n_days, "\n")
cat("Average population density coefficient:", round(pop_density_summary_pm25$mean_pop_density_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Average significant population density coefficient:", round(pop_density_summary_pm25$mean_pop_density_coef_sig, 4), "\n\n")

# Land use effects summary
land_use_summary_pm25 <- results_by_day_pm25 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  summarise(
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_commercial = sum(coef_land_use_commercial_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sig_industrial = sum(coef_land_use_industrial_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sig_mixed = sum(coef_land_use_mixed_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sig_open = sum(coef_land_use_open_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_commercial_coef = mean(coef_land_use_commercial, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_industrial_coef = mean(coef_land_use_industrial, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_mixed_coef = mean(coef_land_use_mixed, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_open_coef = mean(coef_land_use_open, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Land Use Effects (relative to residential):\n")
cat("Commercial areas - significant days:", land_use_summary_pm25$n_sig_commercial, 
    "out of", land_use_summary_pm25$n_days, "\n")
cat("Commercial areas - average coefficient:", round(land_use_summary_pm25$mean_commercial_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Industrial areas - significant days:", land_use_summary_pm25$n_sig_industrial, 
    "out of", land_use_summary_pm25$n_days, "\n")
cat("Industrial areas - average coefficient:", round(land_use_summary_pm25$mean_industrial_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Mixed use areas - significant days:", land_use_summary_pm25$n_sig_mixed, 
    "out of", land_use_summary_pm25$n_days, "\n")
cat("Mixed use areas - average coefficient:", round(land_use_summary_pm25$mean_mixed_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Open space areas - significant days:", land_use_summary_pm25$n_sig_open, 
    "out of", land_use_summary_pm25$n_days, "\n")
cat("Open space areas - average coefficient:", round(land_use_summary_pm25$mean_open_coef, 4), "\n")

# Housing grade effects summary
# COMMENTED OUT: Housing grade removed as a control variable
# housing_grade_summary <- results_by_day %>%
#   filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
#   summarise(
#     n_days = n(),
#     n_sig_housing_D = sum(coef_housing_D_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
#     n_sig_housing_IC = sum(coef_housing_IC_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
#     n_sig_housing_NotGraded = sum(coef_housing_NotGraded_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
#     mean_housing_D_coef = mean(coef_housing_D, na.rm = TRUE),
#     mean_housing_IC_coef = mean(coef_housing_IC, na.rm = TRUE),
#     mean_housing_NotGraded_coef = mean(coef_housing_NotGraded, na.rm = TRUE),
#     .groups = "drop"
#   )
# 
# cat("\nHousing Grade Effects (relative to grade C):\n")
# cat("Grade D - significant days:", housing_grade_summary$n_sig_housing_D, 
#     "out of", housing_grade_summary$n_days, "\n")
# cat("Grade D - average coefficient:", round(housing_grade_summary$mean_housing_D_coef, 4), "\n")
# cat("Grade IC - significant days:", housing_grade_summary$n_sig_housing_IC, 
#     "out of", housing_grade_summary$n_days, "\n")
# cat("Grade IC - average coefficient:", round(housing_grade_summary$mean_housing_IC_coef, 4), "\n")
# cat("Not Graded - significant days:", housing_grade_summary$n_sig_housing_NotGraded, 
#     "out of", housing_grade_summary$n_days, "\n")
# cat("Not Graded - average coefficient:", round(housing_grade_summary$mean_housing_NotGraded_coef, 4), "\n")

# 9. Compare controlled vs uncontrolled social vulnerability effects for PM2.5
cat("\nComparison: Controlled vs Uncontrolled Social Vulnerability Effects (PM2.5):\n")
cat("==================================================================\n")

# You can run this comparison by creating two separate models
# For now, let's analyze the controlled model results

controlled_effects_pm25 <- results_by_day_pm25 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  summarise(
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_social_vuln = sum(coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_social_vuln_coef = mean(coef_social_vuln, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_social_vuln_coef_sig = mean(coef_social_vuln[coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Social Vulnerability Effects (controlling for population density and land use):\n")
cat("Days with significant effect:", controlled_effects_pm25$n_sig_social_vuln, 
    "out of", controlled_effects_pm25$n_days, "\n")
cat("Average coefficient:", round(controlled_effects_pm25$mean_social_vuln_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Average significant coefficient:", round(controlled_effects_pm25$mean_social_vuln_coef_sig, 4), "\n")

# 10. Visualizations for control variables (PM2.5)
# Population density effects over time
results_by_day_pm25 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = coef_pop_density)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = coef_pop_density_p < 0.05, size = coef_pop_density_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "purple"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Effect of Population Density on PM2.5 AQI Over Time",
    subtitle = "Positive values = higher population density associated with worse air quality",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Population Density Coefficient",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12)) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31")))

# Land use effects over time (commercial vs residential)
results_by_day_pm25 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = coef_land_use_commercial)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = coef_land_use_commercial_p < 0.05, size = coef_land_use_commercial_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "orange"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Effect of Commercial Land Use on PM2.5 AQI Over Time",
    subtitle = "Relative to residential areas. Positive values = commercial areas have worse air quality",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Commercial Land Use Coefficient",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12)) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31")))

# Industrial land use effects over time
results_by_day_pm25 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = coef_land_use_industrial)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = coef_land_use_industrial_p < 0.05, size = coef_land_use_industrial_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "brown"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Effect of Industrial Land Use on PM2.5 AQI Over Time",
    subtitle = "Relative to residential areas. Positive values = industrial areas have worse air quality",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Industrial Land Use Coefficient",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12)) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31")))

# Housing grade effects over time (Grade D vs Grade C)
# COMMENTED OUT: Housing grade removed as a control variable
# ggplot(results_by_day %>% filter(model_fit == "Success"), 
#        aes(x = date, y = coef_housing_D)) +
#   geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
#   geom_point(aes(color = coef_housing_D_p < 0.05, size = coef_housing_D_p < 0.05)) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "darkred"), 
#                      labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
#   scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
#   geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
#   labs(
#     title = "Effect of Housing Grade D vs Grade C on PM2.5 AQI Over Time",
#     subtitle = "Positive values = Grade D areas have worse air quality than Grade C areas",
#     x = "Date",
#     y = "Housing Grade D Coefficient",
#     color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
#     size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
#   ) +
#   theme_minimal() +
#   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
#         plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
#         plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12))
# 
# # Housing grade effects over time (Grade IC vs Grade C)
# ggplot(results_by_day %>% filter(model_fit == "Success"), 
#        aes(x = date, y = coef_housing_IC)) +
#   geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
#   geom_point(aes(color = coef_housing_IC_p < 0.05, size = coef_housing_IC_p < 0.05)) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "goldenrod"), 
#                      labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
#   scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
#   geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
#   labs(
#     title = "Effect of Housing Grade IC vs Grade C on PM2.5 AQI Over Time",
#     subtitle = "Positive values = Grade IC areas have worse air quality than Grade C areas",
#     x = "Date",
#     y = "Housing Grade IC Coefficient",
#     color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
#     size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
#   ) +
#   theme_minimal() +
#   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
#         plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
#         plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12))

# ============================================================================
# PM10 ANALYSIS
# ============================================================================
cat("\n--- PM10 AQI Analysis ---\n\n")

# For each day, fit a spatial lag model to understand social vulnerability effects on PM10
# OPTIMIZED: Use parallel processing for day-by-day models (biggest performance gain)
cat("Fitting spatial lag models for PM10 (parallel processing enabled)...\n")
# For each day, fit a spatial lag model to understand social vulnerability effects on PM10
cat("Fitting spatial lag models for PM10 (parallel processing enabled)...\n")
results_by_day_pm10 <- run_daily_spatial_regression(daily_avg, "aqi_pm10_corrected")

# Effect of social vulnerability on PM10 AQI over time (controlling for population density and land use)
results_by_day_pm10 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = coef_social_vuln)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, size = coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "red"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Social Vulnerability Coefficient",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31"))) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 1))  # Adjust limits as needed

# 2. Plot spatial autocorrelation (rho) over time for PM10
results_by_day_pm10 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = rho)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = rho_p < 0.05, size = rho_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "blue"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Spatial Lag Parameter (rho)",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31")))

# 3. Summary of significant social vulnerability effects for PM10
cat("Summary of Social Vulnerability Effects on PM10 AQI:\n")
cat("=====================================================\n")

significant_days_pm10 <- results_by_day_pm10 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success", coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05)

  cat("Days with significant social vulnerability effect:", nrow(significant_days_pm10), "out of", 
      nrow(results_by_day_pm10 %>% filter(model_fit == "Success")), "\n")
  
  success_count_pm10 <- nrow(results_by_day_pm10 %>% filter(model_fit == "Success"))
  cat("Percentage of days with significant effect:", 
      ifelse(success_count_pm10 > 0, round(nrow(significant_days_pm10) / success_count_pm10 * 100, 1), 0), "%\n\n")

if (nrow(significant_days_pm10) > 0) {
  cat("Summary of significant effects:\n")
  print(summary(significant_days_pm10$coef_social_vuln))
  
  cat("\nDirection of effects:\n")
  cat("Positive effects (worse air quality in vulnerable areas):", 
      sum(significant_days_pm10$coef_social_vuln > 0), "days\n")
  cat("Negative effects (better air quality in vulnerable areas):", 
      sum(significant_days_pm10$coef_social_vuln < 0), "days\n")
}

# 4. Monthly averages to identify seasonal patterns for PM10
monthly_effects_pm10 <- results_by_day_pm10 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(month = month(date), year = year(date)) %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_coef = mean(coef_social_vuln, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_coef_sig = mean(coef_social_vuln[coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE),
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_days = sum(coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(month_year = paste(year, month, sep = "-"))

ggplot(monthly_effects_pm10, aes(x = month_year, y = mean_coef)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = n_sig_days > 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "red")) +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Average Social Vulnerability Effect on PM10 AQI",
    subtitle = "Red bars = months with at least one significant day",
    x = "Month-Year",
    y = "Average Social Vulnerability Coefficient",
    fill = "Has Significant Days"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12))

# 5. Model diagnostics for PM10
cat("\nPM10 Model Diagnostics:\n")
cat("==================\n")
model_summary_pm10 <- results_by_day_pm10 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  summarise(
    total_days = n(),
    successful_models = sum(model_fit == "Success"),
    avg_sites_per_model = mean(n_sites, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_sites = min(n_sites, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sites = max(n_sites, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print(model_summary_pm10)

# 6. Identify specific time periods with strongest social vulnerability effects for PM10
cat("\nTime Periods with Strongest Social Vulnerability Effects (PM10):\n")
cat("========================================================\n")

# Top 10 days with strongest positive effects (worse air quality in vulnerable areas)
top_positive_effects_pm10 <- results_by_day_pm10 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success", coef_social_vuln > 0, coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(desc(coef_social_vuln)) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  dplyr::select(date, coef_social_vuln, coef_social_vuln_p, rho, rho_p, n_sites)

cat("Top 10 days with strongest positive effects (worse air quality in vulnerable areas):\n")
print(top_positive_effects_pm10)

# Top 10 days with strongest negative effects (better air quality in vulnerable areas)
top_negative_effects_pm10 <- results_by_day_pm10 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success", coef_social_vuln < 0, coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(coef_social_vuln) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  dplyr::select(date, coef_social_vuln, coef_social_vuln_p, rho, rho_p, n_sites)

cat("\nTop 10 days with strongest negative effects (better air quality in vulnerable areas):\n")
print(top_negative_effects_pm10)

# 7. Seasonal analysis for PM10
seasonal_effects_pm10 <- results_by_day_pm10 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(
    season = get_season_year(date)
  ) %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  summarise(
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_days = sum(coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_coef = mean(coef_social_vuln, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_coef_sig = mean(coef_social_vuln[coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rho = mean(rho, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("\nSeasonal Analysis of Social Vulnerability Effects (PM10):\n")
print(seasonal_effects_pm10)

# 8. Analysis of control variables for PM10
cat("\nAnalysis of Control Variables (PM10):\n")
cat("==============================\n")

# Population density effects
pop_density_summary_pm10 <- results_by_day_pm10 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  summarise(
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_pop_density = sum(coef_pop_density_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_pop_density_coef = mean(coef_pop_density, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_pop_density_coef_sig = mean(coef_pop_density[coef_pop_density_p < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Population Density Effects:\n")
cat("Days with significant population density effect:", pop_density_summary_pm10$n_sig_pop_density, 
    "out of", pop_density_summary_pm10$n_days, "\n")
cat("Average population density coefficient:", round(pop_density_summary_pm10$mean_pop_density_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Average significant population density coefficient:", round(pop_density_summary_pm10$mean_pop_density_coef_sig, 4), "\n\n")

# Land use effects summary
land_use_summary_pm10 <- results_by_day_pm10 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  summarise(
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_commercial = sum(coef_land_use_commercial_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sig_industrial = sum(coef_land_use_industrial_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sig_mixed = sum(coef_land_use_mixed_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sig_open = sum(coef_land_use_open_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_commercial_coef = mean(coef_land_use_commercial, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_industrial_coef = mean(coef_land_use_industrial, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_mixed_coef = mean(coef_land_use_mixed, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_open_coef = mean(coef_land_use_open, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Land Use Effects (relative to residential):\n")
cat("Commercial areas - significant days:", land_use_summary_pm10$n_sig_commercial, 
    "out of", land_use_summary_pm10$n_days, "\n")
cat("Commercial areas - average coefficient:", round(land_use_summary_pm10$mean_commercial_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Industrial areas - significant days:", land_use_summary_pm10$n_sig_industrial, 
    "out of", land_use_summary_pm10$n_days, "\n")
cat("Industrial areas - average coefficient:", round(land_use_summary_pm10$mean_industrial_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Mixed use areas - significant days:", land_use_summary_pm10$n_sig_mixed, 
    "out of", land_use_summary_pm10$n_days, "\n")
cat("Mixed use areas - average coefficient:", round(land_use_summary_pm10$mean_mixed_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Open space areas - significant days:", land_use_summary_pm10$n_sig_open, 
    "out of", land_use_summary_pm10$n_days, "\n")
cat("Open space areas - average coefficient:", round(land_use_summary_pm10$mean_open_coef, 4), "\n")

# 9. Compare controlled vs uncontrolled social vulnerability effects for PM10
cat("\nComparison: Controlled vs Uncontrolled Social Vulnerability Effects (PM10):\n")
cat("==================================================================\n")

controlled_effects_pm10 <- results_by_day_pm10 %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  summarise(
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_social_vuln = sum(coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_social_vuln_coef = mean(coef_social_vuln, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_social_vuln_coef_sig = mean(coef_social_vuln[coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Social Vulnerability Effects (controlling for population density and land use):\n")
cat("Days with significant effect:", controlled_effects_pm10$n_sig_social_vuln, 
    "out of", controlled_effects_pm10$n_days, "\n")
cat("Average coefficient:", round(controlled_effects_pm10$mean_social_vuln_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Average significant coefficient:", round(controlled_effects_pm10$mean_social_vuln_coef_sig, 4), "\n")

# 10. Visualizations for control variables (PM10)
# Population density effects over time
results_by_day_pm10 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = coef_pop_density)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = coef_pop_density_p < 0.05, size = coef_pop_density_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "purple"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Population Density Coefficient",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31")))

# Land use effects over time (commercial vs residential)
results_by_day_pm10 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = coef_land_use_commercial)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = coef_land_use_commercial_p < 0.05, size = coef_land_use_commercial_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "orange"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Commercial Land Use Coefficient",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31")))

# Industrial land use effects over time
results_by_day_pm10 %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = coef_land_use_industrial)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = coef_land_use_industrial_p < 0.05, size = coef_land_use_industrial_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "brown"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Industrial Land Use Coefficient",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31")))

```

#####4b. Ozone Spatial Lag 
```{r}
cat("\n=============================================================================\n")
cat("4a.2 SOCIAL VULNERABILITY INDEX AND OZONE AQI\n")
cat("=============================================================================\n\n")

# For each day, fit a spatial lag model to understand social vulnerability effects on OZONE
# OPTIMIZED: Use parallel processing for day-by-day models
cat("Fitting spatial lag models for Ozone (parallel processing enabled)...\n")
# For each day, fit a spatial lag model to understand social vulnerability effects on Ozone
cat("Fitting spatial lag models for Ozone (parallel processing enabled)...\n")
results_by_day_ozone <- run_daily_spatial_regression(daily_avg, "aqi_ozone_corrected")

# Effect of social vulnerability on Ozone AQI over time
results_by_day_ozone %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = coef_social_vuln)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, size = coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "red"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Social Vulnerability Coefficient",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31"))) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 1))

# Spatial autocorrelation (rho) over time for ozone
results_by_day_ozone %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = rho)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(color = rho_p < 0.05, size = rho_p < 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "blue"), 
                     labels = c("Not significant", "Significant")) +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1, "TRUE" = 2)) +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Spatial Lag Parameter (rho)",
    color = "Significance (p < 0.05)",
    size = "Significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months",
              limits = c(as.Date("2024-12-01"), as.Date("2026-12-31")))

# Summary of significant social vulnerability effects for ozone
cat("\nOzone - Summary of Social Vulnerability Effects:\n")
cat("=================================================\n")

significant_days_ozone <- results_by_day_ozone %>% 
  filter(model_fit == "Success", coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05)

  cat("Days with significant social vulnerability effect:", nrow(significant_days_ozone), "out of", 
      nrow(results_by_day_ozone %>% filter(model_fit == "Success")), "\n")
  
  success_count_ozone <- nrow(results_by_day_ozone %>% filter(model_fit == "Success"))
  cat("Percentage of days with significant effect:", 
      ifelse(success_count_ozone > 0, round(nrow(significant_days_ozone) / success_count_ozone * 100, 1), 0), "%\n\n")

if (nrow(significant_days_ozone) > 0) {
  cat("Summary of significant effects:\n")
  print(summary(significant_days_ozone$coef_social_vuln))
  
  cat("\nDirection of effects:\n")
  cat("Positive effects (worse air quality in vulnerable areas):", 
      sum(significant_days_ozone$coef_social_vuln > 0), "days\n")
  cat("Negative effects (better air quality in vulnerable areas):", 
      sum(significant_days_ozone$coef_social_vuln < 0), "days\n")
}

# Monthly averages for ozone
monthly_effects_ozone <- results_by_day_ozone %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(month = month(date), year = year(date)) %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_coef = mean(coef_social_vuln, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_coef_sig = mean(coef_social_vuln[coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE),
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_days = sum(coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(month_year = paste(year, month, sep = "-"))

ggplot(monthly_effects_ozone, aes(x = month_year, y = mean_coef)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = n_sig_days > 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "red")) +
  labs(
    x = "Month-Year",
    y = "Average Social Vulnerability Coefficient",
    fill = "Has Significant Days"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Seasonal analysis for ozone
seasonal_effects_ozone <- results_by_day_ozone %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  mutate(
    season = get_season_year(date)
  ) %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  summarise(
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_days = sum(coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_coef = mean(coef_social_vuln, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_coef_sig = mean(coef_social_vuln[coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rho = mean(rho, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("\nOzone - Seasonal Analysis:\n")
print(seasonal_effects_ozone)

# Comparison summary
controlled_effects_ozone <- results_by_day_ozone %>%
  filter(model_fit == "Success") %>%
  summarise(
    n_days = n(),
    n_sig_social_vuln = sum(coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_social_vuln_coef = mean(coef_social_vuln, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_social_vuln_coef_sig = mean(coef_social_vuln[coef_social_vuln_p < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("\nOzone - Social Vulnerability Effects Summary:\n")
cat("Days with significant effect:", controlled_effects_ozone$n_sig_social_vuln, 
    "out of", controlled_effects_ozone$n_days, "\n")
cat("Average coefficient:", round(controlled_effects_ozone$mean_social_vuln_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Average significant coefficient:", round(controlled_effects_ozone$mean_social_vuln_coef_sig, 4), "\n")
```


#####4f. When do different vulnerability areas have worse AQI? (High, Moderate, Low - After all controls)

