```{r}
    # Ensure error bars don't go below 0 (AQI can't be negative)
    error_min = pmax(0, mean_aqi - sd_aqi),
    error_max = mean_aqi + sd_aqi,
    # Ensure sig_letter is not empty - use empty string if NA
    sig_letter = ifelse(is.na(sig_letter) | sig_letter == "", "", sig_letter)
  ) %>%
  # Calculate max values per pollutant for proper y-axis scaling
  group_by(pollutant) %>%
  mutate(
    max_error = max(error_max, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Position value labels just above error bars
    value_y_pos = error_max + (max_error * 0.03),
    # Position significance letters above value labels
    sig_y_pos = error_max + (max_error * 0.08),
    # Position for significance brackets
    bracket_y_pos = error_max + (max_error * 0.12)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Function to extract significant comparisons and create bracket data
create_significance_brackets <- function(pairs_result, pollutant_name, category_levels) {
  if(is.null(pairs_result)) return(data.frame())
  
  pairs_df <- as.data.frame(pairs_result)
  if(!"p.value" %in% names(pairs_df) && !"p adj" %in% names(pairs_df)) return(data.frame())
  
  p_col <- if("p.value" %in% names(pairs_df)) "p.value" else "p adj"
  
  # Get significant comparisons - ensure contrast column exists
  if(!"contrast" %in% names(pairs_df)) {
    # Try to use rownames if contrast column doesn't exist
    pairs_df$contrast <- rownames(pairs_df)
  }
  
  # Get significant comparisons with p-values
  sig_data <- pairs_df %>%
    filter(!!sym(p_col) < 0.05, !is.na(!!sym(p_col))) %>%
    dplyr::select(contrast, p_value = !!sym(p_col))
  
  if(nrow(sig_data) == 0) return(data.frame())
  
  # Parse comparisons and create bracket data
  bracket_list <- list()
  
  for(i in 1:nrow(sig_data)) {
    comp <- sig_data$contrast[i]
    p_val <- sig_data$p_value[i]
    
    comp_str <- as.character(trimws(comp))
    # Parse "High - Moderate" format (emmeans uses " - ")
    if(grepl(" - ", comp_str)) {
      parts <- strsplit(comp_str, " - ")[[1]]
    } else if(grepl("-", comp_str)) {
      parts <- strsplit(comp_str, "-")[[1]]
    } else {
      next
    }
    
    if(length(parts) >= 2) {
      cat1 <- trimws(parts[1])
      cat2 <- trimws(parts[length(parts)])
      
      if(cat1 %in% category_levels && cat2 %in% category_levels) {
        # Create significance indicator
        sig_indicator <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
                       ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                       ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")))
        
        # Format p-value label
        p_label <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "<0.001", 
                 ifelse(p_val < 0.01, paste0("=", sprintf("%.3f", p_val)),
                 paste0("=", sprintf("%.3f", p_val))))
        
        bracket_list[[length(bracket_list) + 1]] <- data.frame(
          pollutant = pollutant_name,
          x_start = cat1,
          x_end = cat2,
          cat1 = cat1,
          cat2 = cat2,
          p_value = p_val,
          sig_indicator = sig_indicator,
          p_label = p_label,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      }
    }
  }
  
  if(length(bracket_list) == 0) return(data.frame())
  
  bracket_data <- bind_rows(bracket_list)
  return(bracket_data)
}

# Create bracket data for each pollutant
pm25_brackets <- if(exists("pm25_pairs") && !is.null(pm25_pairs)) {
  create_significance_brackets(pm25_pairs, "PM2.5", c("Low", "Moderate", "High"))
} else {
  data.frame()
}

pm10_brackets <- if(exists("pm10_pairs") && !is.null(pm10_pairs)) {
  create_significance_brackets(pm10_pairs, "PM10", c("Low", "Moderate", "High"))
} else {
  data.frame()
}

ozone_brackets <- if(exists("ozone_pairs") && !is.null(ozone_pairs)) {
  create_significance_brackets(ozone_pairs, "Ozone", c("Low", "Moderate", "High"))
} else {
  data.frame()
}

# Combine all brackets
all_brackets <- bind_rows(pm25_brackets, pm10_brackets, ozone_brackets)

# Add y positions for brackets based on max error per pollutant
# Convert category names to factor positions for plotting
# Handle multiple brackets per pollutant by stacking them vertically
if(nrow(all_brackets) > 0) {
  all_brackets <- all_brackets %>%
    mutate(
      pollutant = factor(pollutant, levels = c("PM2.5", "PM10", "Ozone")),
      # Convert category names to factor positions (Low=1, Moderate=2, High=3)
      x_start_num = match(x_start, c("Low", "Moderate", "High")),
      x_end_num = match(x_end, c("Low", "Moderate", "High")),
      # Ensure x_start < x_end for proper bracket direction
      x_min = pmin(x_start_num, x_end_num),
      x_max = pmax(x_start_num, x_end_num)
    ) %>%
    # Group by pollutant and assign bracket levels (stack vertically if multiple)
    group_by(pollutant) %>%
    arrange(x_min, x_max) %>%
    mutate(
      bracket_level = row_number(),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    # Join with max error values to calculate y positions
    left_join(
      publishable_disparities_data %>%
        group_by(pollutant) %>%
        summarise(base_y = max(error_max, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
      by = "pollutant"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      # Position brackets: first at 15% above max, subsequent at +6% increments
      bracket_y = base_y * (1.15 + (bracket_level - 1) * 0.06),
      # Vertical line height (tick marks) - make them more visible
      tick_height = base_y * 0.02
    )
}

publishable_disparities <- publishable_disparities_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = social_vuln_category, y = mean_aqi, fill = social_vuln_category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = error_min, ymax = error_max), 
                width = 0.25, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray40") +
  # Value labels
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(mean_aqi, 1)), y = value_y_pos), 
            vjust = 0, 
            size = 3.8, 
            fontface = "bold",
            color = "gray25") +
  # Significance letters - only show when there are significant differences
  geom_text(data = publishable_disparities_data %>% filter(sig_letter != "" & !is.na(sig_letter)),
            aes(label = sig_letter, y = sig_y_pos), 
            vjust = 0, 
            size = 5.5, 
            fontface = "bold",
            color = "black") +
  # Significance brackets - show bars connecting significant pairs
  {if(nrow(all_brackets) > 0) {
    all_brackets_with_levels <- all_brackets %>%
      mutate(
        x_min_factor = factor(c("Low", "Moderate", "High")[x_min], levels = c("Low", "Moderate", "High")),
        x_max_factor = factor(c("Low", "Moderate", "High")[x_max], levels = c("Low", "Moderate", "High"))
      )
    list(
      # Horizontal line connecting the two categories
      geom_segment(data = all_brackets_with_levels,
                   aes(x = as.numeric(x_min_factor), xend = as.numeric(x_max_factor), y = bracket_y, yend = bracket_y),
                   inherit.aes = FALSE,
                   color = "black",
                   linewidth = 1.2),
      # Left vertical line (bracket end/tick)
      geom_segment(data = all_brackets_with_levels,
                   aes(x = as.numeric(x_min_factor), xend = as.numeric(x_min_factor), y = bracket_y, yend = bracket_y - tick_height),
                   inherit.aes = FALSE,
                   color = "black",
                   linewidth = 1.2),
      # Right vertical line (bracket end/tick)
      geom_segment(data = all_brackets_with_levels,
                   aes(x = as.numeric(x_max_factor), xend = as.numeric(x_max_factor), y = bracket_y, yend = bracket_y - tick_height),
                   inherit.aes = FALSE,
                   color = "black",
                   linewidth = 1.2),
      # P-value labels above brackets
      geom_text(data = all_brackets_with_levels,
                aes(x = (as.numeric(x_min_factor) + as.numeric(x_max_factor)) / 2, y = bracket_y, label = paste0("p", p_label, sig_indicator)),
                inherit.aes = FALSE,
                vjust = -0.3,
                size = 3.5,
                fontface = "bold",
                color = "black")
    )
  }} +
  facet_wrap(~ pollutant, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("High" = "#D55E00", "Moderate" = "#F59E42", "Low" = "#90C987"),
    name = "Social Vulnerability\nCategory",
    labels = c("High" = "High", "Moderate" = "Moderate", "Low" = "Low")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Social Vulnerability Category",
    y = "Mean AQI (± SD)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.5),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.4)), limits = c(0, NA))

print(publishable_disparities)

# PUBLISHABLE GRAPHIC 2: Percentage difference from Low vulnerability areas
# Calculate pct_diff_from_low explicitly in a separate step
vuln_summary_for_pct <- vuln_summary_combined %>%
  group_by(pollutant) %>%
  mutate(
    low_mean_aqi = mean_aqi[social_vuln_category == "Low"][1]
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    pct_diff_from_low = ifelse(
      !is.na(low_mean_aqi) & low_mean_aqi > 0 & !is.na(mean_aqi),
      round(100 * (mean_aqi - low_mean_aqi) / low_mean_aqi, 1),
      NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-low_mean_aqi) %>%
  filter(social_vuln_category != "Low" & !is.na(pct_diff_from_low)) %>%
  mutate(
    pollutant = factor(pollutant, levels = c("PM2.5", "PM10", "Ozone")),
    social_vuln_category = factor(social_vuln_category, levels = c("Moderate", "High")),
    # Pre-calculate label and vjust to avoid issues in ggplot
    label_text = paste0(round(pct_diff_from_low, 1), "%"),
    label_vjust = ifelse(pct_diff_from_low >= 0, -0.5, 1.5)
  )

publishable_pct_diff <- vuln_summary_for_pct %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = social_vuln_category, y = pct_diff_from_low, fill = social_vuln_category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1, color = "gray50") +
  geom_text(aes(label = label_text, vjust = label_vjust), 
            size = 4.5, 
            fontface = "bold",
            color = "gray20") +
  facet_wrap(~ pollutant, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("High" = "#D55E00", "Moderate" = "#F59E42"),
    name = "Social Vulnerability\nCategory",
    labels = c("High" = "High", "Moderate" = "Moderate")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Social Vulnerability Category",
    y = "Percentage Difference from Low Vulnerability Areas (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.5),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.15)))

print(publishable_pct_diff)

cat("\n=== SUMMARY OF FINDINGS ===\n")
cat("1. Worst months identified:\n")
cat("   - PM2.5:", as.character(worst_month_pm25$month_name), "(Mean AQI:", round(worst_month_pm25$mean_aqi, 1), ")\n")
cat("   - PM10:", as.character(worst_month_pm10$month_name), "(Mean AQI:", round(worst_month_pm10$mean_aqi, 1), ")\n")
cat("   - Ozone:", as.character(worst_month_ozone$month_name), "(Mean AQI:", round(worst_month_ozone$mean_aqi, 1), ")\n\n")
cat("2. Disparities across social vulnerability categories are shown in the summary tables above.\n")
cat("3. Statistical tests (ANCOVA controlling for population_density and land_use_type)\n")
cat("   assess significance of differences after accounting for these covariates.\n")
cat("4. Adjusted means (controlling for covariates) are reported in the ANCOVA output.\n")
cat("5. Visualizations highlight the magnitude and patterns of disparities.\n")
```




# Cumulative Disparity Analysis
```{r cumulative_disparity}
cat("\n=============================================================================\n")
cat("CUMULATIVE DISPARITY ANALYSIS\n")
cat("=============================================================================\n\n")

# Calculate site-day level exceedances
cumulative_disparity <- daily_avg %>%
  filter(!is.na(aqi_pm25_corrected), !is.na(social_vuln_category)) %>%
  mutate(
    aqi_pm25_corrected = ifelse(aqi_pm25_corrected < 0, 0, aqi_pm25_corrected),
    exceeds_50  = aqi_pm25_corrected > 50,
    exceeds_100 = aqi_pm25_corrected > 100
  ) %>%
  group_by(social_vuln_category) %>%
  summarise(
    total_person_days   = n(),
    days_exceed_50      = sum(exceeds_50,  na.rm = TRUE),
    days_exceed_100     = sum(exceeds_100, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_exceed_50       = round(100 * days_exceed_50  / total_person_days, 1),
    pct_exceed_100      = round(100 * days_exceed_100 / total_person_days, 1),
    mean_aqi_pm25       = round(mean(aqi_pm25_corrected,   na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    median_aqi_pm25     = round(median(aqi_pm25_corrected, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(factor(social_vuln_category, levels = c("High", "Moderate", "Low")))

cat("Cumulative disparity summary by social vulnerability category:\n\n")
kable(cumulative_disparity,
      col.names = c("Social Vulnerability", "Total Person-Days",
                    "Days > AQI 50", "Days > AQI 100",
                    "% Days > AQI 50", "% Days > AQI 100",
                    "Mean AQI (PM2.5)", "Median AQI (PM2.5)"),
      caption = "Cumulative PM2.5 AQI exposure by social vulnerability category") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)

# Bar chart: % days exceeding AQI 50 by social vulnerability category
vuln_colors <- c("High" = "#D55E00", "Moderate" = "#0072B2", "Low" = "#009E73")

cumulative_disparity_plot <- ggplot(
  cumulative_disparity,
  aes(x = factor(social_vuln_category, levels = c("High", "Moderate", "Low")),
      y = pct_exceed_50,
      fill = social_vuln_category)
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(pct_exceed_50, "%")),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 4.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vuln_colors, guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = "Social vulnerability category",
    y = "Percentage of days with PM2.5 AQI > 50 (%)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )

print(cumulative_disparity_plot)
```
